falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom was followed by a sustained grind higher, not a V-recovery back to pre-correction highs within two weeks; this would signal a blowoff top continuation rather than a bottoming process

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 41 implies elevated volatility and stress; rapid VIX compression to pre-correction complacency levels would prove the market never entered a genuine bottoming regime and instead was experiencing a shallow dip within a larger uptrend

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern featured yields stabilizing/rising as growth fears peaked; a sharp flight-to-quality bid in bonds would indicate this is a recessionary liquidation event, not a technical correction bottom, invalidating the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
